en: Now these were the people of the province who came up out of the captivity of those exiles whom Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon had carried captive to Babylonia. They returned to Jerusalem and Judah, each to his own town.
zh: 這些猶大省的人，從前被巴比倫王尼布甲尼撒擄到巴比倫去，現在他們從被擄之地回到耶路撒冷和猶大，各歸自己的城鎮。

en: They came with Zerubbabel, Jeshua, Nehemiah, Seraiah, Reelaiah, Mordecai, Bilshan, Mispar, Bigvai, Rehum, and Baanah. The number of the men of the people of Israel:
zh: 他們與所羅巴伯、耶書亞、尼希米、西萊雅、利來雅、末底改、必珊、米斯拔、比革瓦伊、利宏和巴拿一同回去。 以色列民的男丁數目記在下面：

en: the sons of Parosh, 2,172.
zh: 巴錄的子孫二千一百七十二人；

en: The sons of Shephatiah, 372.
zh: 示法提雅的子孫三百七十二人；

en: The sons of Arah, 775.
zh: 亞拉的子孫七百七十五人；

en: The sons of Pahath-moab, namely the sons of Jeshua and Joab, 2,812.
zh: 巴哈．摩押的子孫，就是耶書亞和約押的子孫，二千八百一十二人；

en: The sons of Elam, 1,254.
zh: 以攔的子孫一千二百五十四人；

en: The sons of Zattu, 945.
zh: 薩土的子孫九百四十五人；

en: The sons of Zaccai, 760.
zh: 薩改的子孫七百六十人；

en: The sons of Bani, 642.
zh: 巴尼的子孫六百四十二人；

en: The sons of Bebai, 623.
zh: 比拜的子孫六百二十三人；

en: The sons of Azgad, 1,222.
zh: 押甲的子孫一千二百二十二人；

en: The sons of Adonikam, 666.
zh: 亞多尼干的子孫六百六十六人；

en: The sons of Bigvai, 2,056.
zh: 比革瓦伊的子孫二千零五十六人；

en: The sons of Adin, 454.
zh: 亞丁的子孫四百五十四人；

en: The sons of Ater, namely of Hezekiah, 98.
zh: 亞特的子孫，就是希西家的子孫，九十八人；

en: The sons of Bezai, 323.
zh: 比宰的子孫三百二十三人；

en: The sons of Jorah, 112.
zh: 約拉的子孫一百一十二人；

en: The sons of Hashum, 223.
zh: 哈順的子孫二百二十三人；

en: The sons of Gibbar, 95.
zh: 吉罷珥的子孫九十五人；

en: The sons of Bethlehem, 123.
zh: 伯利恆人一百二十三人。

en: The men of Netophah, 56.
zh: 尼陀法人五十六人。

en: The men of Anathoth, 128.
zh: 亞拿突人一百二十八人。

en: The sons of Azmaveth, 42.
zh: 亞斯瑪弗人四十二人。

en: The sons of Kiriath-arim, Chephirah, and Beeroth, 743.
zh: 基列．耶琳人、基非拉人和比錄人，共七百四十三人。

en: The sons of Ramah and Geba, 621.
zh: 拉瑪人和迦巴人共六百二十一人。

en: The men of Michmas, 122.
zh: 默瑪人一百二十二人。

en: The men of Bethel and Ai, 223.
zh: 伯特利人和艾人共二百二十三人。

en: The sons of Nebo, 52.
zh: 尼波人五十二人。

en: The sons of Magbish, 156.
zh: 瑪革比士的子孫一百五十六人。

en: The sons of the other Elam, 1,254.
zh: 另外一個以攔的子孫一千二百五十四人。

en: The sons of Harim, 320.
zh: 哈琳的子孫三百二十人。

en: The sons of Lod, Hadid, and Ono, 725.
zh: 羅德、哈第和阿挪的子孫共七百二十五人。

en: The sons of Jericho, 345.
zh: 耶利哥的子孫三百四十五人。

en: The sons of Senaah, 3,630.
zh: 西拿的子孫三千六百三十人。

en: The priests: the sons of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua, 973.
zh: 祭司的數目記在下面：耶書亞家的耶大雅的子孫九百七十三人。

en: The sons of Immer, 1,052.
zh: 音麥的子孫一千零五十二人。

en: The sons of Pashhur, 1,247.
zh: 巴施戶珥的子孫一千二百四十七人。

en: The sons of Harim, 1,017.
zh: 哈琳的子孫一千零一十七人。

en: The Levites: the sons of Jeshua and Kadmiel, of the sons of Hodaviah, 74.
zh: 利未人的數目記在下面：何達威雅的子孫，就是耶書亞和甲篾的子孫，七十四人。

en: The singers: the sons of Asaph, 128.
zh: 負責歌唱的：亞薩的子孫一百二十八人。

en: The sons of the gatekeepers: the sons of Shallum, the sons of Ater, the sons of Talmon, the sons of Akkub, the sons of Hatita, and the sons of Shobai, in all 139.
zh: 負責守門的：沙龍的子孫、亞特的子孫、達們的子孫、亞谷的子孫、哈底大的子孫和朔拜的子孫，共一百三十九人。

en: The temple servants: the sons of Ziha, the sons of Hasupha, the sons of Tabbaoth,
zh: 殿役的數目記在下面：西哈的子孫、哈蘇巴的子孫、答巴俄的子孫、

en: the sons of Keros, the sons of Siaha, the sons of Padon,
zh: 基綠的子孫、西亞的子孫、巴頓的子孫、

en: the sons of Lebanah, the sons of Hagabah, the sons of Akkub,
zh: 利巴拿的子孫、哈迦巴的子孫、亞谷的子孫、

en: the sons of Hagab, the sons of Shamlai, the sons of Hanan,
zh: 哈甲的子孫、薩買的子孫、哈難的子孫、

en: the sons of Giddel, the sons of Gahar, the sons of Reaiah,
zh: 吉德的子孫、迦哈的子孫、利亞雅的子孫、

en: the sons of Rezin, the sons of Nekoda, the sons of Gazzam,
zh: 利汛的子孫、尼哥大的子孫、迦散的子孫、

en: the sons of Uzza, the sons of Paseah, the sons of Besai,
zh: 烏撒的子孫、巴西亞的子孫、比塞的子孫、

en: the sons of Asnah, the sons of Meunim, the sons of Nephisim,
zh: 押拿的子孫、米烏寧的子孫、尼普心的子孫、

en: the sons of Bakbuk, the sons of Hakupha, the sons of Harhur,
zh: 巴卜的子孫、哈古巴的子孫、哈忽的子孫、

en: the sons of Bazluth, the sons of Mehida, the sons of Harsha,
zh: 巴洗律的子孫、米希大的子孫、哈沙的子孫、

en: the sons of Barkos, the sons of Sisera, the sons of Temah,
zh: 巴柯的子孫、西西拉的子孫、答瑪的子孫、

en: the sons of Neziah, and the sons of Hatipha.
zh: 尼細亞的子孫和哈提法的子孫。

en: The sons of Solomon's servants: the sons of Sotai, the sons of Hassophereth, the sons of Peruda,
zh: 所羅門僕人的子孫的數目記在下面：瑣太的子孫、瑣斐列的子孫、比路大的子孫、

en: the sons of Jaalah, the sons of Darkon, the sons of Giddel,
zh: 雅拉的子孫、達昆的子孫、吉德的子孫、

en: the sons of Shephatiah, the sons of Hattil, the sons of Pochereth-hazzebaim, and the sons of Ami.
zh: 示法提雅的子孫、哈替的子孫、玻黑列．哈斯巴音的子孫和亞米的子孫。

en: All the temple servants and the sons of Solomon's servants were 392.
zh: 作殿役的和所羅門僕人的子孫共三百九十二人。

en: The following were those who came up from Tel-melah, Tel-harsha, Cherub, Addan, and Immer, though they could not prove their fathers' houses or their descent, whether they belonged to Israel:
zh: 以下這些人是從特．米拉、特．哈薩、基綠、押但、音麥上來的，可是他們無法證明他們的父家或世系是以色列人。

en: the sons of Delaiah, the sons of Tobiah, and the sons of Nekoda, 652.
zh: 這些人是第萊雅的子孫、多比雅的子孫和尼哥大的子孫，共六百五十二人。

en: Also, of the sons of the priests: the sons of Habaiah, the sons of Hakkoz, and the sons of Barzillai (who had taken a wife from the daughters of Barzillai the Gileadite, and was called by their name).
zh: 祭司的子孫中，有哈巴雅的子孫、哈哥斯的子孫和巴西萊的子孫；巴西萊娶了基列人巴西萊的一個女兒為妻，所以起名叫巴西萊。

en: These sought their registration among those enrolled in the genealogies, but they were not found there, and so they were excluded from the priesthood as unclean.
zh: 這些人查考族譜的記錄，卻找不著，因此他們算為不潔淨，不能作祭司。

en: The governor told them that they were not to partake of the most holy food, until there should be a priest to consult Urim and Thummim.
zh: 省長告訴他們不可吃至聖之物，直等到有能用烏陵和土明來決疑的祭司興起來。

en: The whole assembly together was 42,360,
zh: 全體會眾共有四萬二千三百六十人。

en: besides their male and female servants, of whom there were 7,337, and they had 200 male and female singers.
zh: 此外，還有他們的僕婢七千三百三十七人；又有男女歌唱者二百人。

en: Their horses were 736, their mules were 245,
zh: 他們有馬七百三十六匹，騾子二百四十五匹，

en: their camels were 435, and their donkeys were 6,720.
zh: 駱駝四百三十五匹和驢子六千七百二十頭。

en: Some of the heads of families, when they came to the house of the LORD that is in Jerusalem, made freewill offerings for the house of God, to erect it on its site.
zh: 當一些族長到達耶路撒冷耶和華殿的原址的時候，就為 神的殿甘心獻上禮物，要把殿在原址重建起來。

en: According to their ability they gave to the treasury of the work 61,000 darics of gold, 5,000 minas of silver, and 100 priests' garments.
zh: 他們按照自己的力量奉到工程庫裡的，有金子五百公斤和銀子兩千八百公斤，以及祭司的禮服一百件。

en: Now the priests, the Levites, some of the people, the singers, the gatekeepers, and the temple servants lived in their towns, and all the rest of Israel in their towns.
zh: 於是祭司、利未人、歌唱者、守門的、作殿役的，和一部分人民住在城裡；以色列眾人都住在自己的城裡。
